info.title: CivicPulse RESTful API
info.description: API documentation for the CivicPulse backend. Access all endpoints for authentication, users, students, teachers, classes, activities, academic scores, and learning materials.

post.description: Creates a new student or teacher account and returns an authentication token.
Authenticates a user and returns an access token.

get.description: Retrieves the current user's direct details.
Retrieves the current user's profile details.

patch.description: Updates profile details and/or avatar. If uploading an avatar file, use multipart/form-data request body.

get.description: Get a list of student users. Supports search, sort, filter, and pagination.

post.description: Creates a new student user and registers them to a class.

get.description: Get complete profile, class info, activities, and scores for a specific student.

put.description: Replaces all fields for a student resource.

patch.description: Updates only specified fields for a student resource.

delete.description: Soft deletes a student (or force deletes if `force=true` query parameter is provided). Fails with 409 if student has dependencies (activities or scores).

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Set to true to force delete

get.description: Get a list of teacher users.

delete.description: Fails with 409 if teacher is assigned as homeroom teacher to classes.

post.description: Creates a school class. Auto-generates `class_code` if omitted.

delete.description: Fails with 409 if class has enrolled students.

evidence_file.description: Evidence file upload (jpeg, png, pdf, etc.)
Evidence file upload (jpeg, png, pdf, etc.)
Evidence file upload (jpeg, png, pdf, etc.)

patch.description: Restricted to Homeroom/Subject Teachers. Updates activity validation state.

message.example: You do not have permission to access this resource

Conflict.description: Resource has dependent records and cannot be deleted

message.example: Cannot delete resource due to existing relationships

Search.name: search
Search.description: Full-text search query across allowed columns
